summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NO2 Pollution Map Viewer application (2nd iteration). All major features working perfectly including the new analysis page navigation, Socket.IO real-time updates, and enhanced report page with color-coded charts. Backend APIs working correctly with 12/13 tests passing. Frontend fully functional with successful login, map interaction, polygon drawing, analysis pipeline execution, and report generation.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 422 for invalid polygon instead of expected 500 in test
minor_bugs.impact: Actually shows improved error handling - this is a positive change
minor_bugs.fix_priority: NONE - This is better error handling

passed_tests: Login with valid credentials (sarvesh_pc / sarvesh_pc@06) redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows map with CartoDB tiles and draw tools (polygon/rectangle buttons visible)
Draw a polygon on the map using Leaflet draw tools
Click Start Analysis navigates to /analysis/:analysisId page (NEW page, not sidebar)
Analysis page shows pipeline panel on left with 4 agents (Data Fetcher, Stats Analyzer, Trend Analyzer, Recommendation Engine)
Analysis page shows progress bar and percentage at top that updates in real-time
As each agent completes, its results appear in the right panel with slide-in animation
Data Fetcher result shows satellite data info (dataset, date, center, pixels)
Stats Analyzer result shows pollution bars with percentages of safe threshold
Trend Analyzer result shows mini sparkline chart and trend direction
Recommendation Engine result shows pollution level badge and recommendation count
Generate Report button appears after all 4 agents complete
Clicking Generate Report navigates to /report/:analysisId
Report page shows stats as percentages of safe threshold with color bars (not scientific notation)
Report page chart has color zones (green/yellow/red) and safe threshold reference line
Report page recommendations have category icons and impact priority bars
Theme toggle works on all 3 pages (login, analysis, report)
Backend POST /api/analysis/start works and returns analysis_id
Backend GET /api/analysis/{id} returns complete analysis data after pipeline finishes
Socket.IO real-time updates work correctly on analysis page
Progress percentage updates in real-time from 0% to 100%
Agent pipeline shows processing animations and completion status
All 4 agents complete successfully with proper status indicators
Results appear with slide-in animations as each agent completes
Navigation flow works correctly between all pages
Logout functionality works correctly
Date picker opens and allows selection
Polygon drawing tools are functional and responsive
Analysis pipeline takes approximately 15 seconds as expected
Mock data generation works for GEE and Azure OpenAI
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing

success_percentage.backend: 92% (12/13 tests passed - 1 'failure' is actually improved error handling)
